items.name: Scrap Metal
items.description: Salvaged metal pieces. The backbone of basic repairs and low-tier crafting.

items.name: Circuit Board
items.description: Salvaged electronic circuits. Essential for advanced crafting and repairs.

items.name: Medical Supplies
items.description: Basic medical supplies for treating injuries and illness.

items.name: Repair Kit
items.description: Standard repair kit containing tools and materials for train system maintenance.

items.name: Processed Fuel
items.description: Refined fuel suitable for the train's engine. Burns cleaner than crude fuel.

items.name: Crude Fuel
items.description: Unrefined fuel gathered from various sources. Needs processing before use.

items.name: Water
items.description: Purified water. Essential for crew survival and some crafting processes.

items.name: Rations
items.description: Preserved food supplies. Keeps the crew fed during long journeys.

items.name: Crude Water
items.description: Unfiltered water collected from the environment. Needs purification.

items.name: Bandage
items.description: Basic wound dressing for minor injuries.

items.name: Ration Pack
items.description: Preserved food supplies for long expeditions.

items.name: Electronics Kit
items.description: A set of tools and components for electrical repairs.
